name: Are You Being Served in Australia?
original_name: Are You Being Served in Australia?
overview:
An Australian sitcom that is based on the British sitcom of the same name

Mr. Humphries is sent to Australia by Mr. Grace to work temporarily for his Australian cousin Mr. Bone at Bone Brothers.

trailers.title: Get Fit Down Under, Mr  Humphries (Aired: 16.6.1980)
